title: Totem Doll
body:
This resourcepack was a celebration for my Youtube Account's 120 subscriptions.
I make my skin's texture as a Totem of the Undying.
Thanks for my supporters, I will do my best!
Visit [My Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@DoggyEatSushi)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8NuKNmvFJ-g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
